overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a rainy, foggy night in a historic frontier town. The character moves from a cobblestone street into a grassy park area with benches and trees, then approaches a wooden train station building with an American flag.

wet cobblestone road reflecting street lamp light

two-story brick building with lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered porch on a rainy night, with the character walking onto a wet cobblestone street illuminated by warm street lamps. A large brick commercial building stands on the right as the character moves forward, eventually transitioning onto a grassy area.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grassy park area with scattered wooden benches and mature trees. The brick building falls behind to the left while a wooden train station building becomes visible in the distance ahead. The rain continues to fall heavily in the foggy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station forecourt with American flag

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the grassy park and steps back onto cobblestone as they approach the wooden train station building. The American flag becomes prominent on the building's facade as the character draws closer to the covered porch entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy frontier town, transitioning from a narrow urban street into a foggy park and finally toward a train station. It begins under a covered porch as the character steps onto wet cobblestones illuminated by warm street lamps, passing a large brick commercial building. As the character moves forward, the urban environment gives way to a grassy park area filled with mature trees and scattered wooden benches under a heavy downpour. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the greenery and returns to the cobblestone path, bringing a wooden train station building into clear view. Finally, the camera closes in on the station's facade, where a prominent American flag hangs near the covered porch entrance.
